'''''Lakota''''' was an [[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI bulk transport]] stationed on ''[[Saruwen Station]]'' when ''[[Vasudra]]'' had a meeting with ''[[Ravenno]]''.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
